name: schemaledger
description: Self-evolving schema runtime plugin for local LLM workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Task-first schema evolution, memory recall, and lineage tracing for local LLM workflows
interface.longDescription: Run SchemaLedger inside Codex as a repo-local plugin. The plugin starts the local MCP server over stdio, reuses LM Studio and PostgreSQL, exposes task evolution and memory tools, and keeps schema lineage inspectable across Web, MCP, and the database.
defaultPrompt: Evolve a schema for this research task and show the lineage
Recall what we learned about Google and continue the extraction
Inspect task trace, memory, and schema drift for the latest run
